plan.blog_title: Major Announcements from Apple WWDC 2025: A Recap

tasks.title: Identify Key Announcements from WWDC 2025
tasks.goal: List and understand the major announcements made at WWDC 2025.
bullets: Review Apple's official WWDC 2025 website and social media channels for announcements.
Research online news outlets and blogs for analysis and commentary on WWDC 2025 announcements.
Identify and note at least 5 key announcements made at WWDC 2025.

tasks.title: Understand the Impact of WWDC 2025 Announcements on Developers
tasks.goal: Understand how the WWDC 2025 announcements will affect developers and their work.
bullets: Research the new features and tools announced at WWDC 2025 and how they will integrate into existing development workflows.
Analyze how the announcements will impact the development community and potential areas for growth or concern.
Note any changes or updates to Apple's development tools, frameworks, or APIs.
